title: client_task.rs: replace 3x BACKOFF.last().unwrap() with constant
description: Three call sites use .unwrap_or(*BACKOFF.last().unwrap()) / *backoff_secs.last().unwrap(). BACKOFF is a non-empty literal so the unwrap cannot fire, but CLAUDE.md prohibits unwrap() in production. Replace with a named MAX_BACKOFF_SECS constant.
